author: Jayesh Chaudhari, Satyam Kumar, Yusuf Baig
name: k-XSA (k=2): Rank-2 Subspace Exclusive Self-Attention with Quantization-Aware Energy Capping
blurb: Generalizes Apple's XSA from a rank-1 orthogonal projection along v_i to a rank-2 orthogonal projection in a learned subspace anchored at v_i, with second basis W*x_i. Each direction's projection coefficient is soft-thresholded by a learned per-direction tau (energy cap); a per-head learnable alpha (no weight decay) scales the projection. Beats paper-XSA by -0.0019 BPB pre-quant and -0.0019 BPB int6+brotli on the 11L/512d/35.9M baseline. Energy cap absorbs quantization error: the new xsa_basis_proj matrix quantizes for free (per-rank quant penalty drops from +0.0023 BPB to +0.0000 BPB).
method: k-XSA, rank=2, basis=v+x, alpha=free (per-head, no WD), energy_cap=on

architecture.layer_loop: loop layers 4-5 x2 from ~50% of training onward

technique_summary: Rank-2 anchored XSA (v_i + W*x_i) with float32 modified Gram-Schmidt, per-head free alpha (no WD), per-(head,rank) learned tau soft-threshold (energy cap). Built on the 11L/512d/35.9M parameter-golf baseline (Muon + AdamW + EMA + parallel residuals + skip gates + layer-loop). Quantized with GPTQ int6 + int8 embed + brotli. Energy cap eliminates the per-extra-basis-matrix quantization penalty.

reproduce.command: RUN_ID=k2_vx_full XSA_RANK=2 XSA_BASIS=v+x XSA_TARGET=attn XSA_ENERGY_CAP=1 XSA_THRESHOLD_INIT=0.0 XSA_ALPHA_MODE=free XSA_ALPHA_INIT=1.0 XSA_ALPHA_NO_WD=1 XSA_ALPHA_LR=0.02 XSA_ALPHA_CSV=logs/k2_vx_full_alpha.csv MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=0 ITERATIONS=3000 TRAIN_LOG_EVERY=200 SEED=1337 python train_xsa_k.py
